c7197de72a8dbacb8c26adfef4cd89fc327d61b9.shortDescription: Cross-platform CLI video compression tool powered by FFmpeg, with a wizard-style TUI built with Go and Charm's Bubble Tea.
c7197de72a8dbacb8c26adfef4cd89fc327d61b9.longDescription: Features an interactive TUI wizard with step-by-step guided compression, 18 built-in presets across quality tiers and platforms (Discord, YouTube, TikTok), and smart recommendations that analyze your video. Auto-detects NVIDIA NVENC, AMD AMF, Apple VideoToolbox, and Intel QSV for hardware acceleration, and supports batch processing and a headless --no-tui mode for CI/CD pipelines.
quotedSpans:
A cross-platform CLI video compression tool powered by FFmpeg,  
featuring a wizard-style TUI built with Go and Charm's Bubble Tea.
Interactive TUI wizard** -- step-by-step guided compression
18 built-in presets** -- quality tiers, purpose-driven, and platform-specific (Discord, YouTube, TikTok, etc.)
Smart recommendations** -- analyzes your video and suggests the optimal preset
auto-detects NVIDIA NVENC, AMD AMF, Apple VideoToolbox, Intel QSV
Batch processing** -- compress entire folders with parallel workers
Headless mode** -- scriptable `--no-tui` mode with stdin pipe support for CI/CD pipelines

cd610cf98980623d0f13ea5895b19ad6432a1cf9.shortDescription: Spin up your own custom OpenAI API server endpoint for easy AWS Bedrock LLM text inference.
cd610cf98980623d0f13ea5895b19ad6432a1cf9.longDescription: Uses standard baseUrl and apiKey params so you can keep the OpenAI API client you are used to while proxying calls to Bedrock in a compatible way. Great for getting existing OpenAI API compatible applications working with AWS Bedrock.

makes it easy to continue using the OpenAI API client that you are use to by standing up your own OpenAI text compatible endpoint that will proxy all your calls to Bedrock in a compatible way
Great for getting existing OpenAI API compatible applications working with AWS Bedrock.

d20a2d4ddbce99dd9cc5ea52521150e6b14391f3.shortDescription: Obsidian plugin that enhances the footer of your notes by adding backlinks, outlinks, and created/modified dates.
d20a2d4ddbce99dd9cc5ea52521150e6b14391f3.longDescription: Adds backlinks (links FROM other notes TO this note) and outlinks (links FROM this note TO other notes) to the footer. Displays created and modified dates for each note, supports links in frontmatter, and offers customization through opacity and border controls, plus options to exclude folders.
quotedSpans: Rich Foot is an Obsidian plugin that enhances the footer of your notes by adding backlinks, outlinks, and created/modified dates.
Adds `backlinks` to the footer of your notes (links FROM other notes TO this note)
Adds `outlinks` to the footer of your notes (links FROM this note TO other notes)
Displays `created` and `modified` dates for each note
Supports links in frontmatter
Highly customizable appearance with opacity and border controls
Option to exclude folder(s) from displaying

d331dd2543b5b64ec2a9dc6965bbbbb54bdd613d.shortDescription: A tool for analyzing text against predefined topics using average weight embeddings and cosine similarity.
d331dd2543b5b64ec2a9dc6965bbbbb54bdd613d.longDescription: Uses embedding-based semantic analysis with a clustering approach to detect nuanced topic variations. Creates multiple weighted average embeddings per topic and groups similar phrases using agglomerative or HDBSCAN algorithms, with cluster quality measured via per-cluster cohesion and global silhouette score. Powered by the embedding-utils library for vector math, clustering, similarity, and embedding generation.
quotedSpans: A tool for analyzing text against predefined topics using average weight embeddings and cosine similarity.
It uses embedding-based semantic analysis with an advanced clustering approach to detect nuanced topic variations.
Creates several weighted average embeddings for each topic instead of a single representation
Groups similar phrases within topics to form coherent semantic clusters using agglomerative or HDBSCAN algorithms
Measures cluster quality via per-cluster cohesion and global silhouette score
All vector math, clustering, similarity, and embedding generation provided by the [`embedding-utils`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/embedding-utils) library

df502909686d92bd54b14f9084022c71231a70d1.shortDescription: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides comprehensive SQLite database interaction capabilities.
df502909686d92bd54b14f9084022c71231a70d1.longDescription: Supports complete CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete), database exploration and introspection, and execution of custom SQL queries. Define the command in your IDE's MCP Server settings (e.g., Cursor, VSCode) with your database path provided as an argument.
quotedSpans: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides comprehensive SQLite database interaction capabilities.
Complete CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Database exploration and introspection
Execute custom SQL queries
Define the command in your IDE's MCP Server settings
Your database path must be provided as an argument.

e55ca86e40c81886722233a300e5c45625b97013.shortDescription: Convert Markdown to clean, printable HTML with PDF export.
e55ca86e40c81886722233a300e5c45625b97013.longDescription: Features live preview with real-time rendering, 9 print-optimized themes, PDF export with customizable page sizes, margins, and page numbers, and syntax highlighting powered by Shiki. Supports drag and drop file upload for .md, .markdown, or .txt files, and a stateless, privacy-focused design with no account required.
quotedSpans: Convert Markdown to clean, printable HTML with PDF export
Live Preview** - See formatted output as you type with real-time rendering
Multiple Themes** - Choose from 9 print-optimized themes
PDF Export** - Generate professional PDFs with customizable page sizes, margins, and page numbers
Syntax Highlighting** - Beautiful code highlighting powered by Shiki
File Upload** - Drag and drop or upload `.md`, `.markdown`, or `.txt` files
No Account Required** - Stateless, privacy-focused design

e68daf54b24e5349333cc25df618cd59e8a50d9d.shortDescription: An opinionated interface for writing, running, and saving BackstopJS tests.
e68daf54b24e5349333cc25df618cd59e8a50d9d.longDescription: Goal is to allow for an approachable Visual Regression Testing suite that can be organized to accommodate small and large projects. Enforces an opinionated grouping structure, provides a method to write tests via manageable object files, and allows all of BackstopJS's commands to be run from an interface. Utilizes headless Chrome.
quotedSpans: An opinionated interface for writing, running, and saving BackstopJS tests
allow for an approachable Visual Regression Testing suite that can be organized to accommodate small and large projects
enforcing an opinionated grouping structure, providing a method to easily write tests via manageable object files, as well as allowing for all of BackstopJS's commands to be run from an interface
Bivariate utilizes headless Chrome

e8f13df6ff02a7f70363db5f73212d417c431ca3.shortDescription: collection of prompts and .*rules to use with your favorite AI IDE.
e8f13df6ff02a7f70363db5f73212d417c431ca3.longDescription: Planning Prompts are fundamental instructions to start projects, update functionality, and write documentation and implementation plans. Global Rules shape AI behavior across all interactions, covering communication style, code formatting preferences, and general interaction guidelines. Behavior Rules are project-specific instructions that work in tandem with the global rules.
quotedSpans: collection of prompts and `.*rules` to use with your favorite AI IDE
`Planning Prompts` are fundamental instructions that you use often to start projects, update functionality, write documentation and implemntation plans
`Global Rules` are fundamental settings that shape Cursor AI's behavior across all interactions
These rules cover aspects such as communication style, code formatting preferences, and general interaction guidelines
`Behavior Rules` are project-specific instructions that define the role and overall behavior for the AI in relation a the specific project
These rules work in tandem with the global rules set above

ea7ab1ce351f9749956af4fbfa9972785965fa37.shortDescription: An example node-webkit app that could be used as a simple boilerplate to get up and running quickly.
ea7ab1ce351f9749956af4fbfa9972785965fa37.longDescription: A Gulp workflow is provided for CSS/JavaScript development. Defined Gulp tasks include a default task that compiles CSS and JavaScript, watches for changes, and runs the app; gulp build to compile and minify; and gulp app to open the example app.
quotedSpans: This is an example node-webkit app.
could be used as a simple boilerplate to get up and running quickly
A Gulp workflow is provided for CSS/JavaScript development.
default task that compiles your css and javascript, watches for any css/javascript changes, and runs the example app
gulp build
compile and minifiy css and javascript files
gulp app
open the example app by running "nw.exe app" from gulp-shell

f409e367bf1ec45f9d4dc73ba95f3acd4852f5af.shortDescription: Two PowerShell scripts designed to help manage and clean up by purging old directories.
f409e367bf1ec45f9d4dc73ba95f3acd4852f5af.longDescription: purge-files-in-folder.ps1 deletes all files in a specified folder using the robocopy /purge command, and deletes the folder if empty afterward. purge-old-folders.ps1 calls purge-files-in-folder.ps1 for directories older than a specified number of months, helping clean up old directories within a target path in batches.
quotedSpans: These two PowerShell scripts were designed to help manage and clean up by purging old directories.
`purge-files-in-folder.ps1` is a PowerShell script that deletes all files in a specified folder using the `robocopy /purge` command
If the folder is empty after the purge, the script deletes the folder as well.
`purge-old-folders.ps1` is a PowerShell script that calls `purge-files-in-folder.ps1` for directories older than a specified number of months
It helps in cleaning up old directories within a target path in batches.

f6fc564fa6cf22430afd0a9de4abe7abda1b7c06.shortDescription: Simple web app for extracting only the essential styles from raw style properties.
f6fc564fa6cf22430afd0a9de4abe7abda1b7c06.longDescription: A lightweight tool that helps you clean and format CSS properties copied from browser dev tools. Right-click an element in Chrome's dev tools, select Copy CSS, and paste it here to get clean, formatted CSS properties. Removes unnecessary class wrappers, formats properties consistently, handles CSS variables, and preserves hex colors and complex values.
quotedSpans: Simple web app for extracting only the essential styles from raw style properties
A lightweight tool that helps you clean and format CSS properties copied from browser dev tools.
right-click an element in Chrome's dev tools, select "Copy CSS", and paste it here to get clean, formatted CSS properties
Removes unnecessary class wrappers
Formats CSS properties consistently
Handles CSS variables
Preserves hex colors and complex values

fb539c2668436e6583e301d3457b4298b7f2b0cc.shortDescription: A lightweight, clipboard-based text expansion tool for Linux systems, designed with Remote Desktop sessions in mind.
fb539c2668436e6583e301d3457b4298b7f2b0cc.longDescription: Copies your text snippets to the clipboard for easy pasting. File-based snippets live as simple text files in ~/.clipexpand/, with a visual dialog for snippet selection, toast notifications, subdirectory support, and a customizable keyboard shortcut. Works with local sessions (X11/Wayland), Remote Desktop (RDP, VNC), and SSH with X forwarding.
quotedSpans: A lightweight, clipboard-based text expansion tool for Linux systems. Designed with Remote Desktop sessions in mind
ClipExpand copies your text snippets to the clipboard for easy pasting
File-based snippets**: Simple text files in `~/.clipexpand/` directory
Visual dialog for snippet selection
Toast notifications**: Non-intrusive confirmation messages
Subdirectory support**: Organize snippets in folders
Quick access via customizable keyboard shortcut
Local sessions (X11/Wayland)
Remote Desktop (RDP, VNC, etc.)
SSH with X forwarding
